note_main_file: ids 1–5 are all spec_tree=-1 cross-tree entries. None are Arcane spec. No corrections required from this file.
_notes.note_shared_mask2_bit3: mask2 bit3 (=8) is a SHARED MAGE marker bit that appears on: Fireball(133), FrostfireBolt(44614), Pyroblast(11366), Presence of Mind(12043), Arcane Power(12042), Evocation(12051). Any combined-flag entry that includes mask2=8 would accidentally match all of these spells via (mask[i] & spell[i]) != 0. RULE: always drop mask2 from OR'd combined entries involving any of these spells; use only their unique mask0 and mask1 bits.

computed_combined_flags.ArcaneFlows_PoM_AP_Evoc: [67108864, 524320, 0] — PoM mask1_bit5(32)|AP mask1_bit19(524288)|Evoc mask0_bit26(67108864). mask2 dropped to avoid shared-bit contamination.

talent_affixes.name: Arcane Subtlety
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — Arcane spell sub-family not isolatable via SpellMod; acceptable scope for Arcane spec affix. Carrier Frostbolt(116) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. Threat from all Mage spells -20%/rank (THREAT PCT: -20). WotLK: 2r at -20/-40%.

talent_affixes.name: Magic Attunement
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2048,0,0]=mask0 bit11 (0x00000800). Arcane Missiles(5143) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. Arcane Missiles range +10%/rank (RANGE PCT: 10). NOTE: talent also increases area of Arcane Explosion — a second entry (RADIUS PCT +10/rank on Arcane Explosion flags) can be added once Arcane Explosion spell ID and flags are verified with .spellinfo all 1449.

talent_affixes.name: Arcane Instability
talent_affixes.notes: All-ones — affects all Mage spells. Carrier Frostbolt(116) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. Spell damage +1%/rank (DAMAGE PCT: 1). NOTE: WotLK Arcane Instability also increases crit chance by 1%/rank — a second entry (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT +100/rank, same flags/carrier) can be added as id=504 if desired.

talent_affixes._todo: Arcane Concentration (5r, tier 2) — Damaging spells have a 2/4/6/8/10% chance to grant Clearcasting (next spell free). Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Arcane Meditation (3r, tier 3) — Allows 5/10/15% of mana regeneration to continue while casting. Passive regen modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Presence of Mind (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Arcane Mind (5r, tier 4) — Increases total Intellect by 3/6/9/12/15%. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Arcane Flows
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[67108864,524320,0]. OR of: PoM(12043) mask1 bit5(32) + ArcanePower(12042) mask1 bit19(524288) + Evocation(12051) mask0 bit26(67108864). mask2=8 dropped from all three spells to avoid shared-bit contamination (see note_shared_mask2_bit3). Carrier Evocation(12051) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_MAGE. Cooldown of Presence of Mind, Arcane Power, and Evocation -15%/rank (COOLDOWN PCT: -15). WotLK: 3r at -15/-30/-45%.

talent_affixes._todo: Mind Mastery (5r, tier 6) — Increases spell power by 3/6/9/12/15% of total Intellect. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.
Slow (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Torment the Weak (3r, tier 8) — Increases damage to targets with movement impairing effects by 2/4/6%. Conditional (target has debuff), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Arcane Power (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Spell Power (3r, tier 9) — On spell crit, increases spell damage by 5/10/15% for 6 sec. Proc-based conditional, not implementable as SpellMod.
Arcane Barrage (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
